title: Tumor (HCC 17T)
source_name_ch1: Tumor sample from hepatocellular carcinoma patient
treatment_protocol_ch1: The tissues were frozen immediately after collection and were stored at -80 oC.
growth_protocol_ch1: Patients with hepatocellular carcinoma were recruited at diagnosis according to the protocol approved by the Institutional Review Board.  Informed consent was obtained from all subjects before Tissue samples were collected.
extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was extracted from frozen HCC biopsies using TRIZOL Reagent following the manufacturer's protocol.
label_protocol_ch1: Five micrograms of total RNA were reverse-transcribed and labeled with biotin.
hyb_protocol: The final cRNA obtained was hybridized to the GeneChip Human Genome U133 Plus 2.0 Array (Affymetrix, USA).
scan_protocol: GeneChips were scanned using the Affymetrix GeneChip Scanner 3000
description: Gene expression data from HCC Tissue sample of  hepatocellular carcinoma patient
data_processing: The data was analysed using Partek Genomics Suite version 6.6. CEL files were imported into Partek with RMA background correction, quantile normalisation and log2 transformation.Batch effects were removed based on microarray scandate factor using Partek Batch-remove algorithm.

growth_protocol_ch1: Patients with hepatocellular carcinoma were recruited at diagnosis according to the protocol approved by the Institutional Review Board.  Informed consent was obtained from all subjects before Tissue samples were collected.
extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was extracted from frozen HCC biopsies using TRIZOL Reagent following the manufacturer's protocol.
label_protocol_ch1: Five micrograms of total RNA were reverse-transcribed and labeled with biotin.
hyb_protocol: The final cRNA obtained was hybridized to the GeneChip Human Genome U133 Plus 2.0 Array (Affymetrix, USA).
scan_protocol: GeneChips were scanned using the Affymetrix GeneChip Scanner 3000
description: Gene expression data from Adjacent Normal tissue sample of  hepatocellular carcinoma patient
data_processing: The data was analysed using Partek Genomics Suite version 6.6. CEL files were imported into Partek with RMA background correction, quantile normalisation and log2 transformation.Batch effects were removed based on microarray scandate factor using Partek Batch-remove algorithm.

title: major HCC1
source_name_ch1: resected liver tumor
treatment_protocol_ch1: NA
growth_protocol_ch1: NA
extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was isolated using the RNeasy Mini kit (QIAGEN, Valencia, CA)
label_protocol_ch1: Aliquots of total RNA (50 ng) isolated from the liver biopsy specimens were subjected to amplification with the WT-OvationTM Pico RNA Amplification System (NuGen, San Carlos, CA, USA) as recommended by the manufacturer (http://www.nugeninc.com/).5 microgram of resultant cDNA was used for fragmentation and biotin labeling using the FL-OvationTM cDNA Biotin Module V2 (NuGen) as recommended by the manufacturer.
hyb_protocol: The biotin-labeled cDNA was suspended in hybridization cocktail (NuGen), and used for the hybridization. Affymetrix Human 133 Plus 2.0 microarray chip (Affymetrix, Santa Clara, CA, USA) containing 54,675 gene transcripts was used for the analysis. Hybridization (45°C for 16hrs at 60 rpm), washing and staining (using Fluidics Station) were performed according to the standard protocol (Affymetrix).
scan_protocol: The probe array was scanned by GeneChip® Scanner 3000(Affymetrix).
description: HC-MA1
data_processing: Hybridized data files (CEL) were obtained with the GeneChip® Operating Software 1.4 (GCOS) (Affymetrix).The intensity of each gene chip was normalized by one patient using GeneChip® Operating Software 1.4 (GCOS) and further processed by using R 2.13.0(http://www.r-project.org) and Bioconductor (http://www.bioconductor.org) software.Raw CEL file data were normalized using the MAS 5.0 algorithm as implemented in the affy package. Normalized data were log2 transformed.
contact_institute: Kanazawa University Graduate School of Medical Sciences
description.1: Gene expression data from resected liver tumor

description: LC-MA10

description: LC-MI7
data_processing: Hybridized data files (CEL) were obtained with the GeneChip® Operating Software 1.4 (GCOS) (Affymetrix).The intensity of each gene chip was normalized by one patient using GeneChip® Operating Software 1.4 (GCOS) and further processed by using R 2.13.0(http://www.r-project.org) and Bioconductor (http://www.bioconductor.org) software.Raw CEL file data were normalized using the MAS 5.0 algorithm as implemented in the affy package. Affymetrix Human 133 Plus 2.0 microarray chip (Affymetrix, Santa Clara, CA, USA) containing 54,675 gene transcripts was used for the analysis. Hybridization (45°C for 16hrs at 60 rpm), washing and staining (using Fluidics Station) were performed according to the standard protocol (Affymetrix).
scan_protocol: The probe array was scanned by GeneChip® Scanner 3000(Affymetrix).
description: LC-MA4
data_processing: Hybridized data files (CEL) were obtained with the GeneChip® Operating Software 1.4 (GCOS) (Affymetrix).The intensity of each gene chip was normalized by one patient using GeneChip® Operating Software 1.4 (GCOS) and further processed by using R 2.13.0(http://www.r-project.org) and Bioconductor (http://www.bioconductor.org) software.Raw CEL file data were normalized using the MAS 5.0 algorithm as implemented in the affy package. Normalized data were log2 transformed.

label_protocol_ch1: Aliquots of total RNA (50 ng) isolated from the liver biopsy specimens were subjected to amplification with the WT-OvationTM Pico RNA Amplification System (NuGen, San Carlos, CA, USA) as recommended by the manufacturer (http://www.nugeninc.com/).5 microgram of resultant cDNA was used for fragmentation and biotin labeling using the FL-OvationTM cDNA Biotin Module V2 (NuGen) as recommended by the manufacturer.
hyb_protocol: The biotin-labeled cDNA was suspended in hybridization cocktail (NuGen), and used for the hybridization. Affymetrix Human 133 Plus 2.0 microarray chip (Affymetrix, Santa Clara, CA, USA) containing 54,675 gene transcripts was used for the analysis. Hybridization (45°C for 16hrs at 60 rpm), washing and staining (using Fluidics Station) were performed according to the standard protocol (Affymetrix).
scan_protocol: The probe array was scanned by GeneChip® Scanner 3000(Affymetrix).
description: LC-MI1
data_processing: Hybridized data files (CEL) were obtained with the GeneChip® Operating Software 1.4 (GCOS) (Affymetrix).The intensity of each gene chip was normalized by one patient using GeneChip® Operating Software 1.4 (GCOS) and further processed by using R 2.13.0(http://www.r-project.org) and Bioconductor (http://www.bioconductor.org) software.Raw CEL file data were normalized using the MAS 5.0 algorithm as implemented in the affy package. Normalized data were log2 transformed.
